title: Windows Keylogger Indicators
description: Detects indicators of keylogging activity. Attackers deploy keyloggers to capture credentials, sensitive data, and user activity. Detects common keylogger tools, SetWindowsHookEx API calls, and suspicious input recording patterns.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*keylogger*' or 'Command Line' like '*GetAsyncKeyState*' or 'Command Line' like '*SetWindowsHookEx*' or 'Command Line' like '*GetKeyboardState*' or 'Command Line' like '*MapVirtualKey*')) or (('Command Line' like '*logkeys*' or 'Command Line' like '*keystroke*' or 'Command Line' like '*keystrokes.txt*' or 'Command Line' like '*keylog.txt*')))
